scripts.validate: turbo run build check-types lint && pnpm -r --filter='@hurling/gql-schema-explorer' --filter='@repo/logger' --filter='@repo/eslint-config' --filter='@repo/typescript-config' --filter='@repo/jest-presets' exec pnpm publint && pnpm exec attw --pack packages/gql-schema-explorer && pnpm exec attw --pack packages/logger
